fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone where the bin on the worksheet will be located.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number for which bin content should be created.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the bin that should be created.

fields.name: Bin Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin type or bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Warehouse Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warehouse class of the bin or bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Block Movement
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the movement of a particular item, or bin content, into or out of this bin, is blocked.

fields.name: Min. Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum quantity for the bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Max. Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum quantity for the bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the special equipment code of the bin or bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Bin Ranking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ranking of the bin or bin content that should be created.

fields.name: Maximum Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum cubage of the bin that should be created.

fields.name: Maximum Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum weight of the bin that should be created.

fields.name: Fixed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the bin content that is to be created will be fixed for the item.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the bin is to be the default bin for the item on the bin worksheet line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.
